title: RNAseq: mRNA to Illumina library
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This protocol details the RNAseq sample preparation starting with mRNA and ending with quality control of finished libraries. This protocol was used specifically for virus mRNA samples related to ORFeome lab group.
steps_raw: This protocol details the RNAseq sample preparation starting with mRNA and ending with quality control of finished libraries. This protocol was used specifically for virus mRNA samples related to ORFeome lab group.
